panels.title: Equity curve (USD)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, user_id AS metric, equity_usd::float AS value FROM paper_equity_snapshots WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Per-user paper equity over time. Each user is a series so multi-account paper experiments are distinguishable.

panels.title: Realized PnL by symbol (30d)

targets.rawSql: SELECT symbol AS metric, SUM(realized_pnl_usd)::float AS value FROM paper_positions WHERE status = 'closed' AND closed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY value DESC

panels.description: 30-day realized PnL by symbol. Net contribution per pair to the overall paper performance.

panels.title: Win-rate rolling (30 trades)

targets.rawSql: WITH closed AS (SELECT closed_at, (realized_pnl_usd > 0)::int AS win FROM paper_positions WHERE status='closed' AND closed_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY closed_at) SELECT closed_at AS time, AVG(win) OVER (ORDER BY closed_at ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)::float AS value, 'rolling_30' AS metric FROM closed ORDER BY closed_at

panels.description: Rolling win-rate over the last 30 closed paper trades. Edge claim < 55% is statistical noise; ≥ 55% with consistent expectancy is real.

panels.title: Drawdown from HWM (%)

targets.rawSql: WITH eq AS (SELECT ts, user_id, equity_usd::float AS equity FROM paper_equity_snapshots WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') SELECT ts AS time, user_id AS metric, ((equity - MAX(equity) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY ts)) / NULLIF(MAX(equity) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY ts), 0)) * 100 AS value FROM eq ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Drawdown as percent below the running high-watermark. Settings cap is -10% (max_drawdown_circuit_pct); breach should circuit-break the system.

panels.title: Open positions

targets.rawSql: SELECT NOW() AS time, COUNT(*)::float AS value FROM paper_positions WHERE status='open'

panels.description: Active paper positions across all users. Cap implied by max_gross_leverage in M2 RiskManager work.

panels.title: Avg R per closed setup

targets.rawSql: SELECT NOW() AS time, AVG(r_multiple)::float AS value FROM journal_trades WHERE status='closed' AND r_multiple IS NOT NULL AND closed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

panels.description: Average R-multiple across the last 30 days of closed trades. Trade quality summary — positive expectancy starts around +0.25R.
